creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text: It seems a sticky problem with samba: when updating an existent installation, ports management seems incapable of handling the new build - the compiler seems to be misguided when searching for libraries and by accident it picks up the already installed libraries from the __old__ installation instead of picking up the new one in the work environment. This might be due to a misleading path for the inker or search path? Anyway, deinstalling the whole port solves the problem!
